reasoning: The question asks whether Wikipedia will list a vaccine for Pediculosis pubis (pubic lice) by three resolution dates: 2025-11-16, 2025-12-09, 2026-02-07. The base rate for an entirely new vaccine against a human ectoparasite (an insect) to suddenly be approved and added to Wikipedia is exceptionally low — and virtually 0 within the next 3 months, as clinical trials take years and none are known to be anywhere near completion (or even in existance for pubic lice). Given that pubic lice are treated topically with insecticides like permethrin, the notion of a vaccine is medically non-standard for this condition. Wikipedia is extremely unlikely to feature "Yes" for a Pediculosis pubis vaccine by the resolution dates. The probabilities stay extremely low, increasing only marginally for later dates to account for the minute chance of vandalism/error on the Wikipedia page that happens to be captured on the exact resolution date.
